nodes.question: What kind of shoes will the orthotics go in?

chips.label: Work / on my feet all day

nodes.question: Any specific foot pain or condition we should match?
When you walk or stand, do your ankles roll inward or do you have flat-feet symptoms?

attributePrompts.gender: Who are these orthotics for — a man, woman, or kid?
attributePrompts.useCase: What kind of shoes will the orthotics go in? Pick the closest match — dress shoes, casual/everyday, athletic (running/training/general gym), cleats (soccer, football, baseball, lacrosse, rugby, any spike/stud sport shoe), hockey skates, winter boots, work boots, or general comfort (walking, standing all day). If the customer plays a field/court sport, that's CLEATS — never 'comfort'.
attributePrompts.condition: Any specific foot pain or condition we should match? (plantar fasciitis, heel spurs, ball-of-foot pain / metatarsalgia, Morton's neuroma, overpronation / flat feet, diabetic feet, or none — just looking for comfort)
attributePrompts.arch: What's your arch type — flat / low, medium, or high? If you're not sure, that's fine.
attributePrompts.overpronation: When you walk or stand, do your ankles tend to roll inward, or do you have flat-feet symptoms? (yes / no / not sure)
